name: Broccoli & Mushroom Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli just until tender-crisp (about 3 minutes).
2. Drain and rinse the broccoli under cold water.
3. Heat oil over medium heat in a nonstick skillet.
4. Add garlic, onion, and mushrooms; cook until the onion is tender.
5. Transfer to a blender or food processor.
6. Combine cottage cheese and yogurt; season with salt and pepper.
7. Process until smooth and well combined.
8. Cover and refrigerate.
9. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
10. Per serving: 12 calories, .5 grams fat, 0 cholesterol, 22 milligrams sodium.
